client_script.name: Validate Incident Form
client_script.description: Validates form before submission to server

client_script.name: Calculate Fee Preview
client_script.description: Updates fee preview when damage level or book value changes

client_script.name: Show/Hide Fields Based on Type
client_script.description: Shows/hides relevant fields based on damage type selection

client_script.name: Check User Permissions
client_script.description: Checks user role and enables/disables fields accordingly

client_script.name: Handle Photo Upload
client_script.description: Manages photo attachment uploads and validation
